name: Ray of Enfeeblement
description: A beam of enervating energy shoots from you toward a creature within range. The target must make a Constitution saving throw. On a successful save, the target has Disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes until the start of your next turn (engine: Vexed). On a failed save, the target has Disadvantage on its attack rolls for the duration (engine: Enfeebled — applies to all attacks, not just STR-based, since MonsterAttack does not carry a stat-key tag yet). The SRD's 1d8 damage-roll subtraction is descriptive only in the current engine. The target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the spell on a success.
